- Backlog Item ID: BI-260019
- Title: Operationalize branding governance for UI changes
- Persona/Actor: Product owner, designer, and frontend team
- Value statement: For consistent product identity and user trust, ensure every UI/design change explicitly follows the branding brief.
- Context: Branding governance alignment after adding `.github/project/branding.md`.
- Problem statement: Without explicit governance hooks, branding guidance can be ignored during iterative design and implementation.
- Expected outcome: Branding policy is consistently applied in design decisions, implementation details, and review checks.
- Success metric(s):
  - Project instructions explicitly require branding compliance.
  - Architecture governance includes an explicit branding ADR and requirement.
  - Backlog tracking includes branding-governance work item.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `.github/project/project-instructions.md` includes mandatory branding references in constraints, checks, and loading matrix.
  - `.github/project/evolution/adr/ADR-260022.md` and `.github/project/evolution/requirements/REQ-CR-260011.md` formalize branding governance and constraints.
  - Product backlog and backlog status include BI-260019 with traceability to the branding policy file.
- Non-goals: full visual redesign or immediate implementation of all future brand token tooling.
- Constraints: Preserve existing MVP scope and architecture decisions while enforcing branding consistency.
- Dependencies: `.github/project/branding.md`.
- Risks/assumptions:
  - Risk: branding can still drift if review discipline is weak.
  - Assumption: explicit policy references are enough to make branding consistently discoverable and enforceable.
- Validation approach: governance file checks and review checklist confirmation.
- Priority score: 87
- Target window: MVP foundation
- Links:
  - Branding policy: .github/project/branding.md
  - ADR: .github/project/evolution/adr/ADR-260022.md
  - Requirement entry: .github/project/evolution/requirements/REQ-CR-260011.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - Changeset: n/a
